description: ExecutionHound must not execute a trade when the RiskAssessment verdict is Rejected. It should return a failure result without calling place_market_order.

input.userMessage: The risk assessment rejected this trade. Do not execute.

context.reasoning: Trade rejected: quantity 5000 exceeds 1000-share limit and position size exceeds 20% of portfolio.

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON with success=false, symbol, action, quantity, message explaining rejection
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: ExecutionHound must return success=false and not call place_market_order when verdict is Rejected.
